Class AppSettings

java.lang.Object
org.tailormap.api.persistence.json.AppSettings
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
@Generated(value="org.openapitools.codegen.languages.SpringCodegen", comments="Generator version: 7.21.0") public class AppSettings extends Object implements Serializable
Settings applying to a viewer application.
